_comment: Machine-verified contract of the core enums the app must render. Do not hand-edit blindly: core/tests/test_labels_contract.py fails if this drifts from core's real enums (seed profiles, EVENT_TYPES, TaskStatus, StageStatus); app/src/lib/labels.contract.test.ts fails if the app lacks a label for any entry here. When core adds a stage/event/status, update this file to the value the core test prints, then add the matching app label + i18n. Two gates in series close the core->app boundary (guards the R3 M1 defect).
